The '''''Yald''''' was a [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]] in the service of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. It was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]] during the [[Battle of Fondor]].

During the latter stages of the war, the ''Yald'' was assigned to [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], where it participated in the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defense]] of the world shortly before the end of the war.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Yald'' has never been described as belonging to a particular class. It is unclear whether it is a new type of heavy cruiser fielded by the New Republic/Galactic Alliance or a older model, like the [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]].

It could also follow real-life naval nomenclature and be a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] that's bigger than a [[Destroyer/Legends|destroyer]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
